name: UnitTransformation
label: Unit transformation
description: Converts water chemistry measurements to a standardised set of three units per analyte: mg/l, µg/l and µeq/l. The transformation is unit-agnostic: the input unit is detected from the column name (e.g. 'NH4N(µg/l)') and converted accordingly, making this component reusable with any CSV dataset following the '{ANALYTE}({unit})' column naming convention. Supported input units: mg/l, µg/l, ug/l, µeq/l, ueq/l. Also handles paired cross-conversions: NH4 <-> NH4N, NO3 <-> NO3N, SO4 <-> SO4S, PO4 <-> PO4P.

inputs.name: input-data
inputs.label: LOQ-corrected data ZIP
inputs.description: ZIP archive containing tab-separated CSV files with water chemistry data after LOQ correction, one per SiteCode per subprogram. Each CSV must follow the '{ANALYTE}({unit})' column naming convention (e.g. 'NH4N(mg/l)', 'CA(µg/l)'). Produced by the LoqApplication wrapper, but compatible with any CSV set sharing the same column naming convention.

outputs.name: output-data
outputs.label: Unit-transformed data ZIP
outputs.description: ZIP archive with the same CSV files expanded with three unit columns per analyte: mg/l, µg/l and µeq/l.

author: LifeWatch ERIC
